summary: Focana 2.2.3 tightens compact mode, switches the trial to 7 days, and prepares lifecycle email follow-up for the paid launch.
improvements: Compact mode now shows clearer checkboxes for subtasks and Next-up items, including direct checkoff for Next-up work.
The free trial now runs for 7 days before the day-8 upgrade gate appears.
The day-8 upgrade screen now explains that Lemon emails the license key after checkout, with a clearer path for users who already have a key.
A Supabase lifecycle bridge is now available for Loops trial, checkout, and license activation emails.
fixes: Clicking the compact task area to view subtasks no longer grabs or drags the whole compact window.
Clicking the compact timer to open controls no longer accidentally drags the window.
Interacting with compact checklist items no longer leaves the window stuck following the mouse.
